rulings.Case Title: CONS. OF ROBERTO T. REYNA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Former Conservator'S Final Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: ESTATE OF LAURREE KELLY RUSSELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Beneficiary, Violet Mae Trammel, post-deceased Decedent. Her successors in interest are Hiram Duncan and William Duncan, but they both post-deceased Violet Mae Trammel. Petitioners request distribution via 13100 Affidavit; however, the declarants of the Affidavit are the alleged successors in interest of Hiram and William. 2) Many of the 13100 affidavits contain notarial acknowledgments that are not in the right format (e.g. acknowledgment language is missing and notary did not sign under penalty of perjury). The out-of-state notary acknowledgments also appear to not conform to that state's requirements. 3) Raymond Tariq's agent under power of attorney executed a 13100 affidavit on his behalf re: Irene Woods' interest in this estate. It is unclear whether an agent under a power of attorney is able to establish a successor's interest in an estate. 4) Petitioner entered into a Recovery Authorization Contract with an heir finder without prior court authority. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF RE: ELIOT BJORNEBY FOX, DECEASED
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #9, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/14/23. Issue(s) necessitating continuance: 1) Both reimbursements for property tax were accounted for as income, although one was paid out of principal. 2) The filing fee for the 8th account was $435. E-filing costs should be no more than $5. 3) The Chase account is vested in a different trustee's name. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by 6/5/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (The terms of the testamentary trust, as set out in the order for final distribution, not in the will, should be set forth.)

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/31/2023. 1) A receipt signed by the petitioner in his capacity as personal representative of the conservatee's estate must be filed before the conservator bond can be discharged on this petition. 2) The summary of (supplemental) account must be revised to remove the real property distributed to the probate estate. 3) The schedule of transfers to the probate estate must include the real property. 4) The schedules of the ending assets must remove the real property and show $0 balance.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ENEZ ANITA BESSARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/12/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: In addition to the notice issue (Notice of Hearing with instructions on how to appear remotely not mailed at least 15 days before this hearing directly to each party entitled to notice), the successor-in-interest to the post-deceased son still has not been identified. Has a personal representative been appointed? Did he have a trust? (The "Estate of Raymond Bessard" is not sufficient.) Deadline for providing a courtesy copy of the proof of service of notice to the person who is the successor-in-interest to Raymond Bessard must be received by the assigned examiner is 6/30/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (No instructions to serve notice by email appear to have been filed, but since the service list shows mailing addresses, it will be assumed that notice was mailed to each such person listed. The trustee of the devisee trust is entitled to waive an accounting. If there are trust funds that need to be accounted for, beneficiaries of the trust should bring a petition in a trust proceeding.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALEKSANDER ALEKSANDROVICH DONSKOY AKA ALEKSANDER ALEKSANDROVICH DONSKOY AKA DONSKOI ALEKSANDER ALEKSAND
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/14/2023. 1) No courtesy copy of the petition has been received. 2) No proposed order has been received. 3) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(D)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form. 4) Notice must be given to the current attorney of record for the decedent's mother. 5) Notice must be given to the attorney for the personal representative. 6) Notice to the personal representative must be given to his street address as a place of residence or business, as required by Probate Code section 1220(a)(3). 7) At least one box must be checked at item 5a(2) of the petition. 8) At least one box must be checked at item 5b of the petition. 9) Attachment 7 must include allegations required by LRSF 14.26(A). The date of marriage must also be stated. 10) Please provide a copy of a membership/share certificate or other documentation showing how the decedent held title to each business interest. 11) Sufficient information must be provided as to the application of Russian inheritance law to joint property of spouses, including a forced statutory share of each minor child of the decedent. See Civil Code section 946; Estate of Grace (1948) 88 Cal. App. 2d 956, 959. 12) Is the petitioner the only person having legal custody of and residing with each minor of the decedent? See CRC 7.51(d). 13) No guardian ad litem has been appointed for the minor children of the decedent. Is any person, other than the petitioner, currently serving as guardian of the estate for the minors? Note: Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TEDMAN MARK
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/28/2023 to be heard with the related petition for approval of the settlement agreement. The following issues remain unaddressed since the initial hearing in November 2022: 1) No proposed order has been received. No courtesy copies have been received either. 2) Notice must be given on the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-120, with a copy of the most recent remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(D)(6). 3) A specific period for which administration of the estate is sought to be continued must be proposed ("few months" is not sufficient. The specific number of months or a specific date on or before which a petition for final distribution should be ready to be filed must be stated). Note: Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TEDMAN MARK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Final Inventory And Appraisal

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TEDMAN MARK
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/28/2023. 1) Notice of the amended petition must be given on the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-115 for the relief under Probate Code section 850, with a copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(D)(6). Rebekah Mark and each property holder must be served in the manner required by section 851(a). If served by acknowledgment of receipt under CCP section 415.30, the acknowledgment date must be at least 30 days before the hearing, absent a waiver for service (which must be separately signed and filed if applicable). The acknowledgment of receipt must list a copy of the DE-115 form, in addition to a copy of the amended petition. 2) No courtesy copy of the amended petition has been received. Note: Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
